prominence.description: How prominent the content layer is in the rendered area. "hero" promotes it to a featured treatment (fullscreen cover, oversized type).

sizing.description: How the content sizes within its rendered area. contain = letterboxed, cover = crops to fill, fullscreen = scales to viewport.

chrome.description: How much surrounding UI chrome (controls, header, nav) renders. "none" gives a fully immersive treatment.

autoplay.description: Autoplay behavior for media-bearing content. Players that cannot honor a value SHOULD degrade gracefully (e.g. autoplay:on for audio without user interaction → effectively off on mobile browsers).

loop.description: Loop the active item until the listener advances.

lyrics_display.description: How lyrics render on top of audio/video content. scroll_synced requires LRC-format timed lyrics in content metadata.

doc_display.description: How document-type content presents. "excerpt" shows first ~200 words inline; "fullscreen_reader" takes over the viewport with reading flow.

expand_button.description: Show an "expand for more info" affordance (full lyrics, full story, etc.).

sequence_dwell_seconds.description: Seconds the engine dwells on a non-time-based item (image, document) before auto-advancing. 0 disables auto-advance.

pause_between_items_seconds.description: Seconds of silence inserted between items.

content_advance.description: How the next item is triggered. "manual" requires listener input to advance.

narration_position.description: When narration plays relative to its associated content.

pause_after_narration_seconds.description: Seconds of silence after narration ends, before content begins.

audio_ducking_db.description: Decibel reduction applied to background audio (music bed, content audio) while narration is speaking.

narration_music_bed.description: Music bed under narration. "auto" lets the engine pick a low-volume track from the experience. Desktop multi-channel only — mobile pipeline ignores this directive.

page_shell.description: The whole-experience shell the renderer applies. "broadcast" matches the reference Universal Player's native presentation-mode flow (network bumper, item transitions, narration + music bed, end card). "web_page" is the simpler in-flow rendering with full chrome and no narrative shell. Other values are reserved for future framing recipes.

show_ident.description: Whether a brand bug / show ident persists across the experience. "persistent" holds the bug in a corner across every item. "opening_only" shows it during the opening then drops it. "none" never renders a bug.

opening.description: What the experience opens with before the first item plays. "straight" goes directly to item 1. "cold_open" renders a hero card (cover + title + host voiceover) before item 1. "station_ident" plays a network-bumper animation first.

closing.description: What the experience closes with after the last item ends. "abrupt" just stops. "sign_off" plays a host outro (thanks-for-watching + coming-up teasers). "credits_roll" renders a reference-style end card with creator credit + share CTAs.
